name: Mafs
when_to_use: 需要当代视觉品质的二维坐标系、函数曲线与 React 参数拖拽演示时用它而非手写,因为原生 SVG 在坐标变换、缩放手势和可拖控制点的交互品质上会失败；非做统计图或三维场景。
why_valuable: AI 默认能画一张静态 SVG 曲线,却做不到稳定的坐标变换、触控缩放、键盘可达拖拽点和统一视觉；Mafs 原生组件把这些交互细节封装为 React 图元。

data_in.note: 裁剪为 Mafs + Plot.OfX 高频路径。expression 会在 boot 中编成 Plot.OfX 所需的 y(x) 回调,只允许 AI 生成的可信表达式；用户原文必须先经解析器/白名单,不可直接执行。

plots.expression: string —— 以 x 为变量、可用 Math.* 的可信 JavaScript 表达式
plots.domain?: [number, number] —— 默认覆盖当前 viewBox.x
plots.color?: CSS color string —— 默认 Mafs 前景色

viewBox?.x: [number, number] —— 传 viewBox 时必填
viewBox?.y: [number, number] —— 传 viewBox 时必填

spec.note: Mafs 原生 height 属性取明确像素数,默认 400；铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。width 让上游按容器自动测量,容器仍应给出确定可用宽度。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a contemporary-quality 2D coordinate plane, function curves, and React parameter-dragging demonstrations instead of hand-written output, because native SVG tends to fail at coordinate transforms, zoom gestures, and polished draggable controls. It is not for statistical charts or 3D scenes.
en.why_valuable: AI can draw a static SVG curve but cannot reliably deliver coordinate transforms, touch zoom, keyboard-accessible draggable points, and a unified visual system. Mafs packages these interaction details as native React primitives.

data_in.note: Trimmed to the common Mafs + Plot.OfX path. boot compiles expression into the y(x) callback required by Plot.OfX. Allow only trusted expressions generated by AI; user-authored text must first pass through a parser or allowlist and must not be executed directly.

plots.expression: string -- trusted JavaScript expression in x, with Math.* available
plots.domain?: [number, number] -- covers the current viewBox.x by default
plots.color?: CSS color string -- defaults to the Mafs foreground color

viewBox?.x: [number, number] -- required when viewBox is supplied
viewBox?.y: [number, number] -- required when viewBox is supplied

spec.note: Mafs takes an explicit pixel number in its native height prop; default 400. Rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights. Let upstream measure width from the container, which must still provide a definite available width.

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):固定 mafs@0.17.0 + React/ReactDOM 18.2.0，使 jsDelivr 的 hooks 依赖共用同一 React 实例；core.css 进 iframe head。

example._why: React 图元已在 boot 固定,但 viewBox、domain 与字符串表达式仍需最小可运行形状。

carriers.widget: supported:React 根落 shadow,core.css 文本也只进 shadow；纯 SVG,无 worker/wasm/uplink
carriers.codex: supported:React ESM + SVG；需让 React、react-dom、Mafs 使用同一 18.3.1 实例

isolation.evidence: esm grep: ZERO document.head / createElement('style'/'link') / adoptedStyleSheets — all styling comes from external core.css that the boot inlines into the shadow root. No document.body / createPortal — SVG renders into the React root within the given container. Only global listener is a single `window.addEventListener('scroll')` for viewport tracking, which is React-managed (added in useEffect, torn down on unmount) — no uncleaned document-level handlers, hence globalEvents=no. shadowCompatible=yes: React root + SVG live in the shadow container and CSS text is inlined to shadow; requires (and boot ensures) a single shared React 18.3.1 instance. Confidence med — scroll-listener cleanup relies on the React effect idiom rather than a runtime-observed removeEventListener.
